title: Tunisian Haggis Tagine
description: A richly flavored dish featuring haggis, perfect for a date night, with a jammy and fluffy texture, pescatarian-friendly and wood-fired-baked

ingredients.name: haggis
ingredients.notes: traditional Scottish dish made from sheep heart, liver, and lungs, mixed with onions, oatmeal, and spices

instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, mix together the chopped onions, minced garlic, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper
Add the haggis to the bowl and mix well
Stuff the dates and prunes with the haggis mixture
Place the stuffed dates and prunes in a tagine dish
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the stuffed dates and prunes
Cover the tagine dish with a lid
Bake the tagine in the preheated wood-fired oven for 30 minutes
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving
